memory.summary: I planned to finish analysis before reading, but a friend invited me for lunch, introducing an immediate social opportunity.
I made progress on the assignment, but my friend's message signals an immediate social opportunity to join them for lunch.
I spent 1.5 hours on the assignment's analysis section, raising progress to 0.69, though my energy and stress remain moderate.
The analysis section deadline passed at 18:00 while I was only at 78% progress, meaning the task is now incomplete despite my recent efforts.
I continued working on the assignment after 18:00, raising progress to 0.82, but the deadline has already passed.
I advanced the assignment analysis to 86% but missed the reading deadline entirely, leaving me with unfinished tasks and rising stress.
Despite working 0.5 hours after the deadline, my analysis progress only rose to 87%, confirming the task remains incomplete and stress is high.
My analysis progress barely moved to 89% after working past the deadline, confirming my efforts are yielding minimal returns while stress remains high.
After working 1.5 hours past the deadline, my analysis progress only reached 93% while my energy is critically low and stress remains high.
After working 1.5 hours, my analysis progress reached 98%, yet my energy is depleted and stress remains high.
After working until 00:30, the assignment is essentially complete at 99%, but I am now exhausted with significant sleep debt and high stress.
The assignment is now fully complete at 100%, but I am left with zero energy, two hours of sleep debt, and high stress.
